name: Purobeach Menorca
description: Premium beach club in S'Algar: pool, sea access, restaurant and the Puro group's signature music. The island's most exclusive.

practicalInfo.acceso: Approximate location for the area; check the exact spot on the venue's website or Instagram.
practicalInfo.horario: Seasonal; opening hours change each season — check the venue's website or Instagram.

editorial.lead: Menorca is the island of calm —but it also knows how to do an international-brand beach club. Purobeach —the Puro group's first on the island, opened in 2023— brings its formula of a pool above the sea, a restaurant and its own music label to S'Algar, with the restraint the Mediterranean asks for.

sections.heading: The Puro label comes to Menorca
body: Purobeach is an international family of beach clubs with something uncommon: its own music label. In 2023 it opened its first home in Menorca and planted its idea of a Mediterranean day here —pool, sea access, restaurant and wellness— with a polished design that keeps it well clear of the beach shack and closer to a high-end beach club.
It isn't a shack at the water's edge but an integrated space that works as an oasis: you come to spend the day, not just to grab a drink.

sections.heading: A day that stretches into a drink
body: The charm of a place like this is the rhythm. By day the pool and the sea run the show; as the afternoon drops, the Puro label's music and the cocktails rise, and the swim turns, unhurried, into an evening. It's the calm version of going out: a long day of sun that ends in a well-made drink.
For a couple or a group after luxury without the noise, it's one of the easiest plans on the southeast coast.

sections.heading: Where it is
body: Purobeach is in S'Algar, a quiet resort on the southeast coast, in the municipality of Sant Lluís, set within the Aluasoul Menorca complex. It's an area of hotels and small coves, away from the bustle.

goodToKnow: The Puro group's first beach club in Menorca, opened in 2023.
Set within the Aluasoul Menorca complex, in the resort of S'Algar (Sant Lluís).
Pool, sea access, restaurant and the Puro label's music.
Hours, menu and bookings are seasonal: check the official site before you go.
editorial.transferText: S'Algar is a southeastern resort and the evening ends in a cocktail: the comfortable —and sensible— choice is not to drive back. We'll take you there and pick you up with a private chauffeur, in a Mercedes S-Class or V-Class.
